title: Luxury Modern Villa
description: An exquisite luxury villa nestled in the elite neighborhood of Mumbai. Boasting premium architecture, a private infinity pool, a sprawling garden, and automated smart-home systems.

title: Cozy Beachfront Cabin
description: Wake up to the sound of waves in this cozy beachfront cabin. Steps away from the white sands of South Goa, it offers high-speed WiFi, beach access, and an outdoor patio perfect for sunset views.

title: Minimalist Loft Apartment
description: A chic, minimalist loft situated in Bangalore's tech hub. Features high ceilings, industrial floor-to-ceiling windows, open-concept living, and walking distance to cafes and workspace hubs.

title: Skyline Luxury Penthouse
description: Experience peak urban living in this stunning double-story penthouse. Offers panoramic views of the Mumbai skyline, a private rooftop deck, 24/7 concierge, and bespoke Italian furnishings.

title: Rustic Forest Cottage
description: Tucked away in the cedar forests of Manali, this rustic cottage is a perfect mountain retreat. Enjoy cozy evenings by the fireplace, stunning Himalayan mountain views, and nearby hiking trails.

title: Chic Studio Apartment
description: A stylish, space-optimized studio apartment in the lively student and IT district of Pune. Features custom storage, modern appliances, and access to a shared rooftop terrace.

title: Heritage Garden House
description: Immerse yourself in Rajasthani history with this beautifully restored garden house in Jaipur. Featuring traditional stone archways, a private courtyard, lush gardens, and vintage furnishings.

title: Modern Downtown Loft
description: A modern and spacious loft in downtown Delhi. Features raw brick accents, open layout, close proximity to restaurants and shopping plazas, and excellent metro connectivity.

title: Budget Shared Studio
description: Affordable shared studio apartment close to university hubs in Mumbai. Clean spaces, basic utilities, and a community lounge. Ideal for students on a tight budget.
